description:
Perfect replacement for Outlook Express and Windows Live Mail. Easy to use, fast and with amazing new features!


OE Classic is an email and Usenet reader designed to be a perfect replacement for Outlook Express,
Windows Mail, Windows Live Mail and even Mozilla Thunderbird.

The ultimate goal of OE Classic is to be an easy to use, fast, small and secure program with lots of
power features and yet, easy to use for a beginner. Your data always belongs to you as it is stored
in a public-domain format and there are no storage size limits.
